description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 20th, a test vehicle operating in manual driving mode was traveling Northbound on Highway 101 in Belmont when a nearby 
Subaru Outback ran over road debris, which was projected onto the test vehicle.  No injuries were reported and law enforcement was not 
called to the scene.  The test vehicle sustained cosmetic damage to the right headlamp and hood.
Print
Clear Form
